title: Implement human review control surfaces for closeout, decisions, and review compression

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1240, #1241, and #1242 in full: closeout adoption rubric/examples, system-decision traceability, and closeout-first review-compression modes.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep closeout_report derived; do not make AW infer semantic decisions; do not add a dashboard, ADR engine, durable decision database, or mandatory ceremony for small work.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact field names, derived packet shape, documentation placement, tests, and whether the issues fit one cohesive PR or a stack.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct implementation requires a new durable store, broad unrelated refactor, or behavior that would make AW decide architecture/product semantics for the agent.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement the derived decision-review and human-review surfaces, document the adoption and compression contracts, then validate schemas, docs, generated outputs, and runtime tests.
proof_expectations: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: #1240 closeout adoption rubric and representative examples are documented and test-backed.
#1241 decision-review shape is implemented without making AW infer semantic decisions.
#1242 review-compression modes are available as closeout-first derived guidance and human-owned decisions remain explicit.

goal: Implement #1240 closeout adoption examples and quality rubric.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Humans can supervise agent-delivered work through closeout quality, decision facts, review modes, proof, risk, and ownership instead of reconstructing everything from diffs.

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement human review control surfaces for closeout, decisions, and review compression
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Make AW's closeout and report surfaces expose a usable human-control layer for ordinary, broad, lower-trust, and system-shaping work.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add derived decision-review and human-review guidance to closeout/report output, document the adoption and compression contracts, and cover representative examples in tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py; src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/workspace_report.schema.json; docs/reference/workspace-report.md; .agentic-workspace/docs/reporting-contract.md; tests/test_workspace_report_cli.py; this execplan; generated report references only if schema/docs generation requires it.
execution_bounds.max changed files: About 8, unless generated reference/schema outputs require paired updates.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_report_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; AW summary and planning doctor.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.

context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Continue from the active plan, implement decision-review and human-review packets over closeout_report, then validate report tests and generated/schema consistency.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement #1240, #1241, and #1242 in full: closeout adoption rubric/examples, system-decision traceability, and closeout-first review-compression modes.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep closeout_report derived; do not make AW infer semantic decisions; do not add a dashboard, ADR engine, durable decision database, or mandatory ceremony for small work.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

decision_refs: Add derived human-review packets to closeout_report while keeping semantic decisions agent-authored in Planning.

architecture_decision_promotion.target: Planning architecture_decision_promotion or later ADR/docs if this design becomes durable beyond closeout reporting.
decision_refs: Add closeout_report.decision_review, closeout_report.review_compression, and closeout_report.closeout_adoption as derived report packets instead of a dashboard, decision database, or AW-owned semantic classifier.
architecture_decision_promotion.decision: Add derived human-review packets to closeout_report while keeping semantic decisions agent-authored in Planning.
architecture_decision_promotion.rationale: The three issues need human-control facts at closeout, but AW must not infer architecture/product decisions or create another durable state store.
tradeoffs: Keeps closeout_report as the first review surface instead of adding a dashboard.
Requires agents to author decision facts in Planning before system-shaping closeout can be complete.
Leaves durable ADR/docs promotion to decision_pressure instead of embedding it in closeout_report.
architecture_decision_promotion.proof: Focused closeout_report tests, make test-workspace, make lint-workspace, contract/schema checks, structured inventory, generated command package check, maintainer surfaces, schema-reference docs, AW summary, and AW planning doctor passed.
architecture_decision_promotion.durable_owner: Planning architecture_decision_promotion; decision_pressure for later promotion pressure
architecture_decision_promotion.notes: No ADR is required for this PR unless later review decides the derived packet design should become a durable architecture decision.

active_milestone.scope: Implement the three promoted issue outcomes without broad unrelated refactors.

immediate_next_action: Implement derived decision-review facts, closeout adoption guidance, review-compression modes, documentation, and tests.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
